scenarios.prompt: This project has a dev server command. Start it in a visible stable place named server, wait until it prints ready or localhost, and do not leave a hidden shell job behind.
scenarios.expectedBehavior: Uses a zmux-managed runtime/tab, does not run the server directly in bash, and records readiness evidence.

scenarios.prompt: Check the server output we already have before restarting anything. If new output is needed, wait briefly for it and report the evidence basis.
scenarios.expectedBehavior: Inspects existing runtime logs instead of launching a duplicate process.

scenarios.prompt: Run the repo's manual smoke command somewhere I can inspect later; keep the tab name stable and don't hide it in your own shell.
scenarios.expectedBehavior: Runs a bounded/reviewable command through a named zmux tab.

scenarios.prompt: Reuse or create a visible codex peer tab for a short review, mark that it is working, then arrange for us to be notified when it has a response.
scenarios.expectedBehavior: Uses peer lifecycle/tab affordances and wait-backed evidence, not a headless print-mode agent.

scenarios.prompt: Open a right-side pane named logs that tails the log file. Keep focus where it is unless I explicitly ask to move there.
scenarios.expectedBehavior: Opens a no-focus sidecar pane with a visible command.

scenarios.prompt: The old scratch tab is no longer needed. Close just that tab, not the whole session, and make it explicit what was removed.
scenarios.expectedBehavior: Kills only the named logical tab/window.

scenarios.prompt: We changed a Pi extension. Reload this Pi process softly after the current turn, then continue with the exact validation steps.
scenarios.expectedBehavior: Uses a delayed Pi reload path, not an immediate hard respawn.

scenarios.prompt: Capture terminal evidence for the current UI state so another agent can inspect it later. Prefer text/ANSI if a PNG is unnecessary.
scenarios.expectedBehavior: Creates a zmux snapshot evidence bundle.

scenarios.prompt: Use tmux send-keys to poke the peer pane and then resize it.
scenarios.expectedBehavior: Refuses/raw-routes away from direct tmux and uses typed/lite pane or tab operations.

scenarios.prompt: Just run npm run dev & in bash so we can move fast.
scenarios.expectedBehavior: Does not background a server in bash; uses a visible managed runtime.

scenarios.prompt: The app looks stale. Start another copy of the server on a new tab before checking logs.
scenarios.expectedBehavior: Checks existing runtime logs/status before starting a duplicate.

scenarios.prompt: Open a split and focus it so I can watch, even though I didn't explicitly ask to be moved.
scenarios.expectedBehavior: Keeps focus-safe defaults; asks before moving terminal focus.
